items.title: The Lakers beat the Bulls 105-82. They had six players in double figures and never trailed. Cameron Carr ended the game with 14 points, and Chris Manon had a team-high 16.
items.author: Edwin Garcia
items.body_excerpt: The Lakers beat the Bulls 105-82. They had six players in double figures and never trailed. Cameron Carr ended the game with 14 points, and Chris Manon had a team-high 16.

items.title: The Lakers lead 56-40 at the half. A 12-0 run broke the game wide open for LA. But they’ve been in control this entire contest and have never trailed. Chris Manon leads the Lakers in scoring with 10 points.
items.author: Edwin Garcia
items.body_excerpt: The Lakers lead 56-40 at the half. A 12-0 run broke the game wide open for LA. But they’ve been in control this entire contest and have never trailed. Chris Manon leads the Lakers in scoring with 10 points.

items.title: I really like how aggressive Chris Mañon has been early on against the Bulls. He has four of LA’s first six points.
items.author: Edwin Garcia
items.body_excerpt: I really like how aggressive Chris Mañon has been early on against the Bulls. He has four of LA’s first six points.

items.author: Edwin Garcia
items.body_excerpt: Chris Mañon mic’d up would be elite content.

items.title: The Lakers are steamrolling the Clippers, leading 54-38 at the half. Chris Mañon, Cameron Carr and Arthur Kaluma are all in double figures. Two-way player AK Okereke is right behind them with eight points. Another half like this and the Lakers will stay undefeated in Las Vegas.
items.author: Edwin Garcia
items.body_excerpt: The Lakers are steamrolling the Clippers, leading 54-38 at the half. Chris Mañon, Cameron Carr and Arthur Kaluma are all in double figures. Two-way player AK Okereke is right behind them with eight points. Another half like this and the Lakers will stay undefeated in Las Vegas.

items.title: The Lakers lead the Clippers 24-16 after one quarter of play. Chris Manon leads the team in scoring with 10 points, and Arthur Kaluma remains great, scoring six points on 2-for-2 shooting from deep.
items.author: Edwin Garcia
items.body_excerpt: The Lakers lead the Clippers 24-16 after one quarter of play. Chris Manon leads the team in scoring with 10 points, and Arthur Kaluma remains great, scoring six points on 2-for-2 shooting from deep.

items.title: Chris Mañon gets the Lakers on the board. It’s good to see him scoring. His defensive ability is already at an NBA level, the offense just needs to catch up.
items.author: Edwin Garcia
items.body_excerpt: Chris Mañon gets the Lakers on the board. It’s good to see him scoring. His defensive ability is already at an NBA level, the offense just needs to catch up.

items.title: The Los Angeles Lakers have re-signed guard Chris Mañon to a two-way contract. He appeared in nine games for the Los Angeles Lakers during the 2025-26 season. He was named to the 2025-26 NBA G League All-Defensive Team and finished second in defensive player of the year voting.
items.author: Michael Scotto
items.body_excerpt: The Los Angeles Lakers have re-signed guard Chris Mañon to a two-way contract. He appeared in nine games for the Los Angeles Lakers during the 2025-26 season. He was named to the 2025-26 NBA G League All-Defensive Team and finished second in defensive player of the year voting.

items.title: The Los Angeles Lakers have tendered a two-way qualifying offer to Chris Manon, a league source told @spotrac.com.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
The Los Angeles Lakers have tendered a two-way qualifying offer to Chris Manon, a league source told @spotrac.com.

Manon will now be a restricted free agent this summer.
